name: @stackra/ai
purpose: Client AI toolkit — swappable streaming transport (SSE/WebSocket), mount-scoped client tools, personas, draft-then-confirm writes, and HeroUI chat components.
capabilities: SSE + WebSocket streaming transports with resume support
Mount-scoped client tools + UI context frames
Persona system with tenant + role gating
Draft-then-confirm write flow (LLM writes yield to human confirm)
HeroUI Pro chat components (web) + HeroUI Native Pro (native)
Testing subpath with in-memory transport + tool mocks
when_to_use: Building an AI-powered chat or assistant surface that streams tokens and can invoke typed client tools.
when_not_to_use: For plain REST calls use @stackra/http; for background job execution use @stackra/queue.
